Adam Lee

Hi, I am Adam! I previously attended Georgia Tech as a computer science major. Staring Fall 2023, I will be attending Columbia University. My research interests are transformers, code generation, NeRF, and diffusion models. I also spend time on virtual reality applications and music.

(현재 병특을 구하는 중입니다!)
